creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Igor Ostapenko from comment #4)
Limited with FreeBSD, yes. Now I found even releng/13.3 has kyua in base.
I'm not sure but what about non-FreeBSD OS'es which use FreeBSD ports?
If anything (maybe Dragonfly and FreeBSD-derived "distros") lacks kyua on base, we should keep check for non-FreeBSD.
